---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new skill or an improvement to an existing one
labels: enhancement
---

## What should the skill help with?

Describe the job in plain language.

## When should the AI use it?

List example prompts or situations.

## What should be out of scope?

List anything the skill should avoid doing.

## Safe example

Use synthetic data only. Do not include private documents, secrets, or real client material.
